jokes.setup: Why don't scientists trust atoms?

Why did the scarecrow win an award?
jokes.punchline: Because he was outstanding in his field!

What do you call a bear with no teeth?

jokes.punchline: Because it had too many problems.

jokes.setup: What do you call cheese that isn't yours?
How do you organize a space party?

jokes.punchline: Because it saw the salad dressing!

jokes.setup: What do you call a pile of kittens?
Why can't a leopard hide?
What do you call a magician dog?
Why did the cookie go to the hospital?
What do you call a factory that makes okay products?

jokes.punchline: In case he got a hole in one.

jokes.setup: What kind of shoes do banana peels wear?
Why are elevator jokes so good?
jokes.punchline: They work on so many levels.
